input.description: Show final source and test diffs

content.content: M src/main/java/io/github/hectorvent/floci/services/lambda/LambdaController.java

content.text:
Implemented the Lambda response fix.

What changed:
- Updated `src/main/java/io/github/hectorvent/floci/services/lambda/LambdaController.java`
- `buildFunctionConfiguration(...)` now always includes:
  - `LastUpdateStatus: "Successful"`
  - `LastUpdateStatusReason: "The function was successfully updated"`

This affects:
- `UpdateFunctionCode` response
- `GetFunctionConfiguration` response
- `GetFunction` response under `Configuration`
- `ListFunctions` entries, since they also use the same configuration builder

Validation:
- Added temporary regression assertions to `LambdaS3CodeIntegrationTest` to verify:
  - `UpdateFunctionCode` returns `LastUpdateStatus`
  - `GetFunction` returns `Configuration.LastUpdateStatus`
  - `GetFunctionConfiguration` returns `LastUpdateStatus`
- Ran:

```bash
JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-25-openjdk-amd64 PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/java-25-openjdk-amd64/bin:$PATH ./mvnw test -Dtest=LambdaS3CodeIntegrationTest
```

Result: tests passed.

Per instructions, I then removed the temporary test modifications. Current remaining change is only the production fix in `LambdaController.java`.

Note: Running tests with the default Java failed because the active Java was 21 while the project requires release 25, so I reran with the installed Java 25.

result:
Implemented the Lambda response fix.

What changed:
- Updated `src/main/java/io/github/hectorvent/floci/services/lambda/LambdaController.java`
- `buildFunctionConfiguration(...)` now always includes:
  - `LastUpdateStatus: "Successful"`
  - `LastUpdateStatusReason: "The function was successfully updated"`

This affects:
- `UpdateFunctionCode` response
- `GetFunctionConfiguration` response
- `GetFunction` response under `Configuration`
- `ListFunctions` entries, since they also use the same configuration builder

Validation:
- Added temporary regression assertions to `LambdaS3CodeIntegrationTest` to verify:
  - `UpdateFunctionCode` returns `LastUpdateStatus`
  - `GetFunction` returns `Configuration.LastUpdateStatus`
  - `GetFunctionConfiguration` returns `LastUpdateStatus`
- Ran:

```bash
JAVA_HOME=/usr/lib/jvm/java-25-openjdk-amd64 PATH=/usr/lib/jvm/java-25-openjdk-amd64/bin:$PATH ./mvnw test -Dtest=LambdaS3CodeIntegrationTest
```

Result: tests passed.

Per instructions, I then removed the temporary test modifications. Current remaining change is only the production fix in `LambdaController.java`.

Note: Running tests with the default Java failed because the active Java was 21 while the project requires release 25, so I reran with the installed Java 25.
